description: issue #332 (A2), closing the gap A1's reviewer flagged: A1 (#331) parses `explain`/`why`/`hint`/`debug` as ordinary zero-arity `Call`/`ParenCall` nodes with no static arity check, matching Turtle/Data precedent, so `(explain 1)` parses and checks clean. A2 rejects any nonzero-input parenthesized meta-command call AT RUNTIME with the stable `ol-too-many-inputs` diagnostic (spec/error-model.md) — reusing the same builder every other arity violation in the runtime uses — and emits no `tutor-output` event.
